Blackberry brambles run alongside a brick wall in the side parking lot of a small Vietnamese cafe or something. Watch out for huge ants though!
Huge fig tree in front of Cherokee Arms Apartments- REALLY tall tree along brick fence. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: July-unknown.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
Pear tree in front yard. High yielding. Ask owner's permission before picking. Access: Private but overhanging.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
Heirloom plums and apples on the east side of the Magevney House lawn Access: Public.
